Intraday post 19/May

Weekly post is here. I updated it. Please, re-read it, I added very important infos.

Coding intraday positioning:

The speed profile is net negative with a net slope of -80.40%. It turns to positive only below the zero speed 5895.55The centroid of this profile is 5970.23/5985.66To the upside, index should take out 5991.54 and vol down otherwise it is instable, illiquid. Downside pivot is 5933.65; from there the speed profile starts to shift, but it becomes net positive under the zero speed, signaling downside risk / vol up towards 5860 first then 5805/5795 zone, where we should see downside longer gamma taking effect. See weekly post about the risk.Charm profile is net suppressive, color exposure is negative, favoring for net gamma decay during the day. Coding zero vanna at 5926; relatively low vol is needed to break above that. Profile does not favor for it.

OptionsDepth Heatmap:

(Description is here)
